calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq.  Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-29-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Kelly Dixon, Esq., for Daniel J. Cunningham, Petitioner.

At the court's query, Ms. Dixon advises that she has no additional testimony to provide to the court. The court advises that it is satisfied that Probate Code 6124 does not apply. This matter was set for hearing for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Sep-17-1990, lost codicil dated Mar-30-2010, codicil dated Aug-29-2011, and codicil dated Apr-07-2014 are admitted to probate. Daniel J. Cunningham is appointed Administrator with Will Annexed, with full authority. Bond is set at $650,000. Isidoor Bornsteing is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-25-2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Peou. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Continued To Jul-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
